zh.lifeSummary: 當Diego Garcia de Toledo I於1284年出生在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利時，他的父親Juan Garcia de Toledo27歲，母親Inés García de Toledo23歲。他去世於1330年在西班牙享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toledo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Ramon, Rafael, Juan, Antonio, Jesus, Miguel, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco.

Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from the city in central Spain, which was the capital of the Visigothic state between the 6th and 8th centuries. Its role declined for three centuries after the Muslim invasion of Spain, until it was taken as the capital of the kingdom of Castile between the 11th and 16th centuries. It was a major cultural and political center throughout the Middle Ages, and was also the home of an important Jewish community. The placename, first recorded in Latin as Toletum, is of obscure etymology, possibly connected with Toleto in Piedmont; Jewish tradition connects it with Hebrew toledot ‘generations’, but this is no more than folk etymology. Compare Toledano .

Jewish (Sephardic): also an adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the surname their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Toledano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Shlomo, Igal, Moshe, Shimon, Ehud, Shmuel, Yehuda.  Spanish Alberto, Gonzalo, Alina, Carlos, Conrado, Elena, Enrique, Evelia, Luis, Manuel, Miguel, Ramona.  French Gabrielle, Michel.
Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Toledo (see   Toledo  ), from an adjectival form of the placename.

nameMeanings.name: Diego
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain; perhaps from Santiago or from a native Iberian name found in Latin as Didacus.

nameMeanings.name: Garcia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

variants.name: Marsha
meanings: Phonetic spelling of   Marcia  , associated particularly with the American film star  Marsha Hunt  (  b. 1917 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Diego Garcia de Toledo I was born in 1284, in New Castile, Spain, his father, Juan Garcia de Toledo, was 27 and his mother, Inés García de Toledo, was 23. He died in 1330, in Spain, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diego Garcia de Toledo I est né en 1284, à New Castile, Espagne, son père, Juan Garcia de Toledo, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Inés García de Toledo, avait 23 ans. Il est décédé en 1330, à Espagne, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diego Garcia de Toledo I 1284 in New Castile, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Juan Garcia de Toledo 27 und seine Mutter Inés García de Toledo 23. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diego Garcia de Toledo I è nato il nel 1284 nel New Castile, Spagna, il suo padre, Juan Garcia de Toledo, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Inés García de Toledo, aveva 23 anni. Morì nel 1330, nel Spagna, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Diego Garcia de Toledo Iが1284年にスペインニュー カスティルで生まれた時，父Juan Garcia de Toledoは27歳，母Inés García de Toledoは23歳であった。彼は1330年にスペインで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Diego Garcia de Toledo I(이)가 1284년 스페인 뉴 카스틸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Juan Garcia de Toledo(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Inés García de Toledo(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1330년 스페인에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diego Garcia de Toledo I nasceu em 1284, em New Castile, Espanha, seu pai, Juan Garcia de Toledo, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Inés García de Toledo, tinha 23 anos. Ele faleceu em 1330, em Espanha, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diego Garcia de Toledo I родился в 1284 г. в местности ню кастиль, Испания, его отцу по имени Juan Garcia de Toledo было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Inés García de Toledo, 23. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diego Garcia de Toledo I nació en 1284, en New Castile, España, su papá, Juan Garcia de Toledo, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Inés García de Toledo, tenía 23 años. Murió en 1330, en España, a la edad de 46 años.
